What we offer

Services

Compliance representation and market intelligence for sports tech companies operating in or entering South Africa.

Intelligence

African sports technology market intelligence

AfricanSTN is building a directory of sports technology companies operating across Africa, alongside sector research and market analysis.

Registered members receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports covering African sports tech developments, funding activity, and market trends. Directory inclusion is curated - companies can register their interest and AfricanSTN will confirm inclusion.

Register your interest

Company directory

Sports tech companies across Africa, organised by sector, country, and stage. Directory inclusion is curated - register your interest to be considered.

Sector intelligence

Analysis of the African sports tech landscape, funding trends, and market developments.

Market mapping

Country-level analysis beginning with South Africa, expanding across the continent as the platform grows.

Deal tracking

Investment rounds, M&A activity, and partnership developments across the African sports tech ecosystem.

Compliance

POPIA Representation

The Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) is South Africa's primary data protection legislation. If your company collects, processes, or stores data from South African individuals, POPIA requires you to appoint a local representative in South Africa.

AfricanSTN provides that representation - handling regulatory correspondence with the Information Regulator of South Africa, maintaining compliance documentation, and keeping you informed of regulatory developments that affect your operations.

SaaS platforms Data processors Sports tech companies International operators
POPIA Reg. 2026-002350 · African Sports Technology Network (Pty) Ltd is POPIA compliant and registered with the Information Regulator of South Africa.
Enquire about POPIA representation

Local representative registration

Registered as your appointed local representative with the Information Regulator of South Africa.

Regulatory correspondence

All communication with the Information Regulator handled, with notification of any enquiries or developments affecting your registration.

Compliance documentation

Maintenance of the compliance records and documentation required under POPIA.

Regulatory monitoring

Tracking changes to POPIA guidance and regulation, with notification of anything that affects your South African data operations.

Enquire

Interested in any of these services?

Register your interest and AfricanSTN will be in touch within two business days to discuss what is right for your organisation.

Register interest Contact us directly

We use cookies and local storage to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Optional cookies help with analytics and remembering your preferences. Learn more
